scripts.restore: dotnet tool restore && dotnet restore CS20200-2048.sln && npm install
scripts.dev:client: dotnet fable watch src/Client --outDir src/Client/output --run vite --config src/Client/vite.config.mjs --host 0.0.0.0
scripts.build:client: dotnet fable src/Client --outDir src/Client/output && vite build --config src/Client/vite.config.mjs
scripts.build: npm run build:client && npm run build:server
